info.name: Blog Platform API
info.description: Complete API collection for Blog Platform. Base URL: http://localhost:8000

exec: // After this runs — access_token and refresh_token are saved for user1
console.log('Saved: access_token and refresh_token for user1');
// After this runs — access_token and refresh_token are overwritten for author1
// Use this token for all Author - Own Blog Management requests
console.log('Saved: access_token and refresh_token for author1');
// After this runs — admin_access_token and admin_refresh_token are saved for adnin
// Use this token for all Admin - User Management and Admin - Blog Management requests
console.log('Saved: admin_access_token and admin_refresh_token for adnin');
// After this runs — superadmin_access_token and superadmin_refresh_token are saved for root
// Use this token only for Superadmin requests
console.log('Saved: superadmin_access_token and superadmin_refresh_token for root');
// Uses: refresh_token (sends it) → saves new access_token and refresh_token
